name: Baby Corn Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into a 10-12 inch frying pan. Place over medium-high heat until the oil just starts to smoke, about 2 minutes.
2. Add ginger, shallot, chilies, and coriander all at once. Stir for 30 seconds.
3. Add rice vinegar, soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Boil, uncovered, over high heat until the sauce is reduced to 1 cup, about 1 minute.
4. Let cool.
